# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration


{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "resourceGroup": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "apiVersion": "2018-11-30",
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "name": "[parameters('functionName')]",
      "location": "West US",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": {
          "reference": {
            "id": "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/{serverFarmName}"
          }
        },
        "managedPipelineMode": "Integrated"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "apiVersion": "2018-11-30",
          "type": "extensions",
          "name": "ManagedIdentity",
          "properties": {
            "type": "SystemAssigned"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",

      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b2498df0-c4b0-42d6-b9e8-ac26c841b53a",

      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/7d2ff46e-1dab-4a77-9230-dabac298b258",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName')), '2018-11-30').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
